mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.place_name as parent_name, c.place_name as campus_name, b.place_name as building_name, b.building_no as parent_building_no FROM places s LEFT JOIN places p ON s.parent_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN places c ON s.campus_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN places b ON s.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM places WHERE place_code = #{placeCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM places WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY place_code
SELECT * FROM places WHERE place_type = 'CAMPUS' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY place_code
SELECT * FROM place WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND place_type = 'FLOOR' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY floor_number
SELECT * FROM place WHERE path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY path
SELECT * FROM places WHERE org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY path
mapper.update: UPDATE place SET current_occupancy = #{occupancy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM places WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM place WHERE id IN ( SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{path}, '/', numbers.n), '/', -1) AS UNSIGNED) as ancestor_id FROM ( SELECT 1 n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 ) numbers WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(#{path}) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(#{path}, '/', '')) >= numbers.n ) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY level

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN place_type = 'FLOOR' THEN 1 END) as floor_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN place_type = 'ROOM' THEN 1 END) as room_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN place_type = 'ROOM' THEN capacity ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_capacity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN place_type = 'ROOM' THEN current_occupancy ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_occupancy FROM place WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE place SET current_occupancy = current_occupancy + #{increment}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{placeId} AND deleted = 0 AND capacity IS NOT NULL AND (current_occupancy + #{increment}) <= capacity
